title: Sidebar
description: Side navigation with sections, items, icons and badges. Supports collapsed mode (icon-only), nested items and different active styles.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Flat list of items with controlled active state.

collapsed.title: Collapsed (rail)
collapsed.desc: Icon-only mode with automatic tooltips on hover.

sections.title: With sections
sections.desc: Group items under titles for better organization.

footer.title: With footer
footer.desc: Footer slot for logout or profile buttons.

props.sections: Sections to render (each with title and items).
props.items: Shortcut: flat item list rendered as an anonymous section.
props.collapsed: Icon-only mode: hides labels, badges and sub-items.
props.activeVariant: How the active state is rendered.
props.dividers: Renders borders between header / body / footer.

emits.select: Emitted when an item is activated.
